title: Camping in the Redwoods
summary:
Abby had found a great little spot in Jedediah Smith Redwoods State Park, a gorgeous campground in the heart of the redwood forest. We spent the evening playing Wingspan, I made some stif-fry for everyone and we sat around the fire. In the morning, I took a nice hot shower before Colin and I walked around the campground for our morning coffee walk, which has become a ritual for us. I really loved this campground and wish we had more time to explore.

-Helen

photos.caption: Helen promised her dad that she would hug a redwood tree.
Abby being excited to play Wingspan.
Our nice setup for a game of Wingspan.
